creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #2)
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #3)

I've unfortunately converted the affected machine into a squid proxy server, so I removed X11, Wine, etc and run the unit headless on 12.1-RELEASE.  I figured there was something oddball with RACK on this platform, so I reverted back to the stock TCP stack and use CDG for congestion control.  The em0 interface on this thing also has other issues, such as with jumbo frames, so I am treating it very conservatively until 12.2-RELEASE comes out with hopefully a lot of networking fixes.
